spec.objective: Author images/codex-subagent/Dockerfile -- multi-stage build mirroring images/claude-subagent/Dockerfile: stage-1 compiles the static codex-subagent Go binary from cmd/codex-subagent; stage-2 starts from a Node/Debian base, installs the Codex CLI binary (npm install -g @openai/codex pinned to a specific version) and git, copies the Go binary, and sets USER 1000. Image ref convention: ghcr.io/jsquirrelz/tide-codex-subagent. Verified: docker build exits 0 offline (no OPENAI_API_KEY baked in).
